553 ANTPLTLT_TKNG_ADMSN_CD ANTPLTLT_TKNG_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Is taking): Antiplatelet (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking any medications by pharmacological classification, not how it is used, 
from the antiplatelet class. 0 = No
